properties.name: Europol Headquarters
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Publicly documented physical headquarters; visitor address Eisenhowerlaan 73, The Hague.

properties.name: Europol Operational and Analysis Centre
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Functional node: Europol states this is the gateway for information and intelligence channelled through Europol.

properties.name: European Cybercrime Centre (EC3)
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Functional node: cybercrime expertise and operational support; public location is Europol/The Hague, exact internal location not separately public.

properties.name: European Counter Terrorism Centre (ECTC)
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Functional node: counter-terrorism platform established after the 2015 attacks; public location is Europol/The Hague.

properties.name: European Financial and Economic Crime Centre (EFECC)
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Functional node: financial/economic crime centre founded in 2020; public location is Europol/The Hague.

properties.name: Europol Innovation Lab
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Functional node: supports innovation for the law enforcement community; public location is Europol/The Hague.

properties.name: EU Internet Referral Unit (EU IRU)
properties.confidence: high for existence; exact coordinate is HQ or cartographic offset
properties.source_note: Functional node: based at Europol ECTC; detects, analyses and refers terrorist/extremist online content.
